title: Gerhalt III

*[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]<ref name="Slice">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Gerhalt system/Legends|Gerhalt system]], and therefore Gerhalt III, in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Altier sector/Legends|Altier sector]]. Furthermore, {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-expansion-region|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Expansion Region}} depicts the Altier [[Sector/Legends|sector]] as being located between the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroutes]] ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' identifies as the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] and the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. Finally, ''The Essential Atlas'' also designates the portion of the Expansion Region situated between those two [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] as being a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]].</ref>

'''Gerhalt III''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="Gamer2" /> located in the [[Altier sector/Legends|Altier sector]],<ref name="EAOC Gerhalt" /> a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC Gerhalt" /> Gerhalt III<ref name="Gamer2" /> was situated in the [[Gerhalt system/Legends|Gerhalt system]],<ref name="EAOC Gerhalt" /> which was a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[17,000 BBY]]. From that [[Standard year/Legends|year]]<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> till [[3996 BBY]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected the [[Star system/Legends|system]] to the [[Surron system/Legends|Surron]] and [[Tarmidia system/Legends|Tarmidia systems]]; however, the [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route had ceased to exist by [[3960 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

At some point during the history of the Republic, [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] helped avert the [[Vinth Conflict]]<ref name="Gamer2" />—the namesake of the [[Vinth system/Legends|Vinth system]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> in the Altier [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] neighboring<ref name="Expansion">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-expansion-region|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Expansion Region}}</ref> [[Venzeiia sector/Legends|Venzeiia sector]]<ref name="EAOC" />—on Gerhalt III.<ref name="Gamer2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gerhalt III was mentioned in "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Duros]]," an article authored by [[Bart Armstrong]] and [[Steve Miller]] with [[Cory Herndon]] and published in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]<ref name="Gamer2" /> in [[February]] [[2001]].<ref name="Gamer2 date">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20010118.html|text=''Star Wars Gamer'' #2}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gerhalt [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Gerhalt III, in grid square O-13.<ref name="TEA" />
